name: Aider
description: Open-source AI pair programmer that runs in your terminal and edits code in your local git repo.

name: Amazon Q Developer
description: AWS's AI assistant for software development, integrated into IDEs and the command line.

name: Amp
description: Sourcegraph's agentic coding tool that runs in the terminal and integrates with editors.

name: Bolt
description: StackBlitz's web-based AI app builder that scaffolds and runs full-stack apps in the browser.

name: Claude Code
description: Anthropic's official CLI for agentic coding in the terminal, with IDE integrations.

name: Cline
description: Open-source autonomous coding agent that runs as a VS Code extension.

name: Cody
description: Sourcegraph's AI coding assistant for editors, with codebase-aware chat and edits.

name: Codex CLI
description: OpenAI's official open-source agentic coding CLI.

name: Continue
description: Open-source AI coding assistant for VS Code and JetBrains, bring-your-own-model.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: GitHub's AI pair programmer, available in major IDEs and on the GitHub website.

name: Crush
description: Charm's open-source terminal coding agent with a TUI interface.

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor built on VS Code, with first-class agent and tab features.

name: Devin
description: Cognition's fully autonomous software engineer that runs long-horizon tasks in a sandbox.

name: Gemini CLI
description: Google's official open-source agentic CLI for Gemini models.

name: Goose
description: Block's open-source on-machine AI agent for developers, extensible via MCP.

name: JetBrains AI Assistant
description: JetBrains' built-in AI assistant for IntelliJ-family IDEs.

name: Kiro
description: AWS's agentic IDE focused on spec-driven development.

name: Lovable
description: Web-based AI app builder that generates full-stack apps from natural-language prompts.

name: opencode
description: Open-source AI coding agent for the terminal with a polished TUI.

name: OpenHands
description: Open-source autonomous AI software-engineering agent (formerly OpenDevin).

name: PearAI
description: Open-source AI code editor, a fork of VS Code with integrated agent features.

name: Qwen Code
description: Alibaba's official agentic CLI for Qwen Code models.

name: Replit Agent
description: Replit's in-browser AI agent that builds and deploys apps from a single prompt.

name: Roo Code
description: Open-source autonomous coding agent for VS Code, originally forked from Cline.

name: Supermaven
description: Long-context AI code completion for major IDEs.

name: Tabnine
description: AI code completion and chat for major IDEs, with self-hosting options.

name: Trae
description: ByteDance's AI-powered IDE built on VS Code.

name: v0
description: Vercel's web-based AI generator for UI components and full-stack apps.

name: Windsurf
description: AI-native IDE built on VS Code, with agentic and tab-completion features.

name: Zed
description: High-performance multiplayer code editor with built-in AI agent features.

name: Other
description: Use this if the coding agent you used isn't in the list yet. Please open a PR to add it.
